generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in gear transmission transforming rotational energy"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in gear transmission transforming rotational energy"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder directly on motor for measuring motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for measuring gear position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor current measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, FrictionModelIdentificationService
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkGearboxModel, FrictionModelIdentificationService
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, FrictionModelIdentificationService
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService, ControlAccuracyEnhancementService
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService, ControlAccuracyEnhancementService
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural description of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural description of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB SysML tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysML_BDD, SysML_IBD
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, ControlAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance ControlAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control accuracy enhancement through friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancementAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization provides contextual understanding for operational decisions"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights for white-box and black-box models"
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to control algorithms based on friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements streamed via MQTT, enabling continuous synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, AAS, SysML and Simulink models, data processing components, and dashboard visualization for unified monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), utilizing live sensor data during robot operation for friction analysis and control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data deviations; white-box and black-box friction models calibrated against real-time operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial asset description and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
